recipes

2 minute cherry jelly recipe that's as healthy as it is easy to make.

No Spoons Wasted – 13 May 2026

This is a super easy 2-minute jelly for those low spoon days. You can use it as topping on cottage cheese, toast, in oatmeal.

Prep Time 5 min
Cook Time 5 min
Total Time 10 min
Servings 4 servings
Difficulty Easy
Spoons

Ingredients

  • 1 Cup Cherry Juice
  • 3 TB Psyllium Husk

Instructions

  1. Heat the cherry juice up in a sauce pan until steaming - not boiling. No bubbles.
  2. Add in the Psyllium Husk and whisk it rigorously.
  3. Put it in the fridge until it sets up.

Sharing is caring

No Spoons Wasted

No Spoons Wasted is a blog for people who live with low energy. We provide easy recipes, simple strategies, and helpful products for the days when you just can't.
